title: How many total boards in our account and the owners
excerpt:
We would love to be able to see how many total boards our account has and who the owners are for each board. 
It would also be helpful to see how many boards a single person owns, especially when someone leaves the organ…

posts.author: dara_t (Dara Thomason)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would love to be able to see how many total boards our account has and who the owners are for each board.
It would also be helpful to see how many boards a single person owns, especially when someone leaves the organization and you need to switch ownership.
